title: zanthoxylum hartii
intro: Zanthoxylum hartii, also known as Hart's pepper tree or Batoe-kuning, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Indonesia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum hartii include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
